result.text:
How to Earn $FAME in Leagues?

The Alpha event from @RumbleKongs  that you can’t miss

Here are the steps that’ll help you get rich ↓

⓵ Play Casual and level up your Rumble Pass

⓶ Win in the league to qualify for a bigger allocation

Yeah, it’s that simple, your actions are key

Here’s what I’m doing to win:

· Train in Casual before hitting the league

Win rate ratios are super important

· Buy chests and grab skins

Upgrade your Kongs to get stronger in the game

And don’t forget to grab your free tickets from the shop every day! 🎟️
